notes: RETIRED/REFUTED 2026-06-23 by operator verdict. Refutation record + retirement: claims/B3-BCC-STRUCT/notes/b3-reframe-continuum-260623-260623-v1.1.tex.txt; negative-results R-2026-06-23-b3-bcc-structural-selection.
title: BCC structural selection among tested ordered condensates
statement: REFUTED. The original claim -- within {LAM,HEX,FCC,SC,BCC} the fixed ordered BCC structure minimises the free energy at the operating point ($F_{\rm BCC}<F_{\rm FCC}<F_{\rm SC}$) -- is withdrawn: Math194 re-run places BCC at rank 9 of 10, and Math400 (T0) shows the canonical-$\mu^2$ SMA 'BCC minimum' is a saddle (all lattices collapse to disordered $F=0$). Operator verdict 2026-06-23: the reframe onto B1 is REJECTED (B1's relative ranking is not a physical-selection claim); B3 is RETIRED.
scope: REFUTED -- no surviving claim under this card. See negative_result_ref.
no_overclaim: This card asserts nothing positive. The restricted ranking projection lives in B3-RH-TESTED-STRUCTURE-RANKING (T4); physical BCC selection is NOT established by either.
next_action: None for this card (retired). Physical BCC structure must be re-established as a NEW claim by certifying F[Psi_min]<F[0], lambda_min^perp>=0 (symmetry-projected), N->inf on the canonical PDE background.
